candidate.notes: same label 'ceiling light' across non-adjacent places

object_a.label: ceiling light
object_a.long_form_open_description: Circular flush-mount ceiling fixture with a metal ring and frosted diffuser providing warm ambient light. Centered in the hallway ceiling near the foreground-to-middle region; casts even illumination.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted on the ceiling above and slightly ahead of the American flag and the hallway floor
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Circular flush-mount ceiling fixture with a metal ring and frosted diffuser providing warm ambient light. Centered in the hallway ceiling near the foreground-to-middle region; casts even illumination.

object_b.label: ceiling light
object_b.description: flush mount round ceiling light visible near top center-right
object_b.long_form_open_description: Circular flush-mounted ceiling fixture with a frosted diffuser and a metallic or painted trim ring. It is mounted on the ceiling near the foreground of the hallway/entrance area and casts diffuse light downward.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered in the upper middle of the image just above the partial dividing wall and hallway entry
